name: Branded Retribution
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>烙</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>らく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>印</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>いん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>断</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>罪</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ざい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When a Spell/Trap Card, or monster effect, is activated that includes an effect that Special Summons a monster(s): Return to the Extra Deck, 1 face-up Fusion Monster you control, or 2 Fusion Monsters in your GY, that mention "Fallen of Albaz" as material, and if you do, negate the activation, and if you do that, destroy that card. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 "Branded" Spell/Trap in your GY, except "Branded Retribution"; add it to your hand. You can only use 1 "Branded Retribution" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
eff: When a Spell/Trap Card, or monster effect, is activated that includes an effect that Special Summons a monster(s): Return to the Extra Deck, 1 face-up Fusion Monster you control, or 2 Fusion Monsters in your GY, that mention "Fallen of Albaz" as material, and if you do, negate the activation, and if you do that, destroy that card. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 "Branded" Spell/Trap in your GY, except "Branded Retribution"; add it to your hand. You can only use 1 "Branded Retribution" effect per turn, and only once that turn.

sets.set: THE CHRONICLES DECK: The Fallen & The Virtuous (All-Foil Edition)

jp_sets.set: THE CHRONICLES DECK: The Fallen & The Virtuous (All-Foil Edition)

action: Returns from your field to your Extra Deck
Returns from your Graveyard to your Extra Deck
mst: Negates the activation of Effect Monster's effect
Negates the activation of Spell Cards
Negates the activation of Trap Cards
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
